g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Modbus RTU master?')
sendPrompt('What does the FT232 chip do?')
sendPrompt('What is a Modbus TCP client?')
sendPrompt('What does the DHCP server do when ESP32 boots?')
sendPrompt('What does the W5500 chip do?')
sendPrompt('Explain the ESP32 shared memory in the DHCP bridge')
sendPrompt('How does applyHardware control the pump?')

svg.text: check serial monitor on boot to get assigned IP
